**Notes**

Check [ROADMAP.md](../../blob/main/ROADMAP.md) first — if it's listed there,
comment on scope/priority rather than re-proposing it. Requests to add
auto-merge or weaken trust tiers will be declined; those are product rules,
not missing features.
